item.title: FPL_TomHadley: FPL Meerkat reposteó Tom Hadley FPL @FPL_TomHadley · 16 abr. I’ve collected some data that might help with Free Hit plan

FPL Meerkat reposteó Tom Hadley FPL @FPL_TomHadley · 16 abr. I’ve collected some data that might help with Free Hit planning + transfers:

Best DGW positional fixtures and players to target
(Mini thread with graphics) #FPL 52 69 720 188 mil
